zh.lifeSummary: 當Adela Talvas於大約1120年出生時，她的父親Guillaume III Talvas34歲，母親Hélène de Bourgogne41歲。她於大約1135年與William de Warenne結婚。他們至少是1個女兒的父母。她去世於1174年10月10日在英國維爾爾享年55歲，埋葬在英國素可列維斯。

nameMeanings.name: Talvas
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Adrien, Andre, Emile, Armand, Patrice, Raoul, Yves.

variants.name: Salva
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Spanish Aida, Marina, Alfonso, Blanca, Carlos, Fernando, Gustavo, Jaime, Jose, Juan, Juana, Julio.
Catalan (Salvà): from the personal name Salvà, Catalan form of Latin Silvanus (a derivative of silva ‘wood’).
Italian (northern): from a short form of the personal name   Salvato  .

nameMeanings.name: Adela
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: form of   Adele  , especially popular in the late 19th century.

variants.name: Adella
meanings: form of   Adele  , especially popular in the late 19th century.

en.lifeSummary: When Adela Talvas was born about 1120, her father, Guillaume III Talvas, was 34 and her mother, Hélène de Bourgogne, was 41. She married William de Warenne about 1135. They were the parents of at least 1 daughter. She died on 10 October 1174, in Wiltshire, England, at the age of 55, and was buried in Lewes, Sussex, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Adela Talvas est née environ 1120, son père, Guillaume III Talvas, avait 34 ans et sa mère, Hélène de Bourgogne, avait 41 ans. Elle a épousé William de Warenne environ 1135. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fille. Elle est décédée le 10 octobre 1174, à Wiltshire, Angleterre, à l’âge de 55 ans, et a été enterrée à Lewes, Sussex, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Adela Talvas um 1120 geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Guillaume III Talvas 34 und ihre Mutter Hélène de Bourgogne 41. Sie hat um 1135 William de Warenne geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Tochter. Sie starb am 10. Oktober 1174 im Alter von 55 Jahren in Wiltshire, England und wurde in Lewes, Sussex, England begraben.

Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlia. Morì il 10 ottobre 1174, nel Wiltshire, England, all'età di 55 anni, e fu sepolta a Lewes, Sussex, England.

ko.lifeSummary: Adela Talvas(이)가 대략 1120년에 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Guillaume III Talvas(은)는 34세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Hélène de Bourgogne(은)는 41세였다. 그녀는 대략 1135년 William de Warenne(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1174년 10월 10일 영국 윌츠히르에서 55세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 수세스 루스에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Adela Talvas nasceu aproximadamente 1120, seu pai, Guillaume III Talvas, tinha 34 anos e sua mãe, Hélène de Bourgogne, tinha 41 anos. Ela casou-se com William de Warenne aproximadamente 1135. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filha. Ela faleceu em 10 de outubro de 1174, em Wiltshire, Inglaterra, com 55 anos, e foi sepultada em Lewes, Sussex, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Adela Talvas родилась около 1120 г., её отцу по имени Guillaume III Talvas было 34 года, а матери, которую звали Hélène de Bourgogne, 41. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени William de Warenne около 1135 г. У них была по крайней мере 1 дочь. Она умерла 10 октября 1174 г. в местности уилцхир, Англия в возрасте 55 лет и была похоронена в местности львесь, суссекс, Англия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Adela Talvas nació aproximadamente 1120, su papá, Guillaume III Talvas, tenía 34 años y su mamá, Hélène de Bourgogne, tenía 41 años. Se casó con William de Warenne aproximadamente 1135. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hija. Murió el 10 de octubre de 1174, en Wiltshire, Inglaterra, a la edad de 55 años, y fue sepultada en Lewes, Sussex, Inglaterra.
